arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer latest: Will Arne Slot beat Barcelona, Real Madrid to Andrew Robertson replacement in summer window?
arts.sum: Liverpool may soon make an approach for a potential successor to Andrew Robertson, with concerns about the long-term future of the Reds defender under Arne Slot.

arts.ttl: Ansu misses Barca training ahead of Real Sociedad clash
arts.sum: Ansu Fati is having a tough time at Barcelona this season and looks set to miss out once again on Sunday when Hansi Flick’s side take on Real Sociedad in La Liga. The forward missed training on Saturday with a fever and it seems likely he won’t be part of the squad once again for the match against Imanol Alguacil’s side.

arts.ttl: Man United wonderkid 'wanted by Barcelona' as Catalan giants 'look to take advantage' of English club's financial concerns
arts.sum: Barcelona are allegedly interested in signing Manchester United attacker Alejandro Garnacho during this summer's transfer window.
